description: Mardomsalari (مردم‌سالاری, meaning 'Democracy') is the official newspaper of the [Democracy Party of Iran](/orgs/democracy-party-iran), founded in 2002. It is one of the few reformist-affiliated newspapers still publishing in Iran. [Mostafa Kavakebian](/people/mostafa-kavakebian), the party's founder and secretary-general, serves as editor-in-chief. The paper covers Iranian domestic politics from a reformist perspective and has survived successive press crackdowns that shuttered many reform-era publications.
editorial_notes: One of few surviving reformist newspapers. Kavakebian is editor-in-chief.
